title: docs: regenerate APIDOCS.md
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Auto-generated from OpenAPI spec changes after a successful production deploy.

gist.headline: The map grew two pixels
gist.blurb: The API map has been freshly regenerated from the production OpenAPI spec. Tiny documentation pollen, carefully catalogued.
gist.summary: Regenerated APIDOCS.md from the current production OpenAPI specification, updating two lines to keep the API reference aligned with deployed behavior.
gist.impact: Developers consulting APIDOCS.md get a reference that matches the current production API contract.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy garden-shed documentation desk where Polly, wearing tiny librarian glasses, updates a glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal. Small code-plants and flowers represent the living OpenAPI spec, with a subtle two-line revision on the page.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot wearing tiny librarian glasses, carefully stamping a glowing API field guide beside a retro terminal, while little code-plants sprout from lime green (#ecf874) pots and warm cream flowers bloom around the desk. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, subtle pixel-font text: 'API DOCS', emotionally warm and nostalgic.
